prompt: A dramatic vertical sci-fi anime poster in a gritty Evangelion-inspired hangar corridor, showing a pale blue short-bob girl in a glossy white futuristic plugsuit walking forward in the exact center foreground with a calm, emotionless posture, arms relaxed at her sides, while a towering orange-and-black biomechanical mecha crouches protectively and menacingly behind her, filling most of the background. The girl should resemble a Rei Ayanami-inspired pilot, with short icy blue hair, very pale skin, and a skintight white suit with black side panels, subtle gray seam lines, and 4 colored circular chest details in red, green, blue, and dark metallic tones. The mecha should resemble an EVA Unit-00-inspired robot, with heavy angular armor, a cyclopean faceplate, long clawed arms, crouched legs, battle-worn yellow-orange plating, black and dark gray understructure, scratches, grime, and damage. Set the scene in a devastated industrial bay with collapsed metal beams, broken concrete, smoke, steam, dangling cables, wet reflective flooring, and bright orange sparks erupting from shattered machinery on both sides. On the left wall, include a large worn NERV-style mural with a red leaf logo and the text GOD'S IN HIS HEAVEN. ALL'S RIGHT WITH THE WORLD.. Use cinematic low-angle composition, strong depth, photorealistic materials, hard rim lighting from above, cool steel-blue shadows, warm spark highlights, volumetric haze, ultra-detailed textures, high contrast, ominous atmosphere, and premium movie-poster polish. Make it feel like a dark live-action Evangelion poster, hyper-detailed, realistic, intense, and iconic.
